marshallese.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) ear kōṃṃan juon system ñan harmony in bebop. System eo an ej kōjerbal 6th chords ijjelọkin 7ths im ej kobaik diminished passing chords ikōtaan degree ko in scale ñan bwe ainikien en etal eṃṃan.
marshallese.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: iien ñan tōpar volume eobrak. Decay: iien ñan wanlaḷ ñan sustain. Sustain: joñan volume eo ej dāpij. Release: iien in jako ālikin aṃ kōtḷọk key eo.
marshallese.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Juon scale ej juon set in pitch ko eṃōj karōki. Modes rej rotation ko in scale ej jino jān degree ko rej āinwōt juon. Kajjojo ej kōṃṃan juon mood in eñjake eoktak.
marshallese.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Chords rej ejaak jān kobaik interval ko (3rds). Major ej kōjerbal juon major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor ej ukōti. Extended chords rej kobaik 7ths, 9ths, im eḷapḷọk.
marshallese.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks rej kōjerbal juon sine oscillator ippān pitch sweep. Snares rej koba noise (filtered) + tone body. Hi-hats rej kōjerbal high-pass filtered noise bursts.
marshallese.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = 4 quarter-note beats ilo juon bar (eḷaptata). 3/4 = eñjake in waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 im 7/8 rej kōṃṃan grooves rejjab jejjet, rej oktak.
marshallese.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Keys rej karōki kōn 5ths rej wanlōñḷọk ilo iaḷ in awa. Keys rej epaake doon rej jejaake 6 iaan 7 note. Etal ilo iaḷ in awa ej kobaik sharps; oktak jān awa ej kobaik flats.
marshallese.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Kajjojo ainikien music ewōr overtones ilōñin fundamental eo. Kajoor ko aer relative rej pepe kake timbre — eñin unin trumpet ej āinjuon jān flute ilo ejja pitch eo wōt.
marshallese.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Juon interval ej tolọk ikōtaan ruo pitch, joñe ilo semitones. Frequency ratio ej pepe consonance (ratios rejjabmāālel āinwōt 3:2 rej roñ eṃṃan).
marshallese.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Ej kōjañ note ko in chord juon-juon ilo laajrak. Lōñ = jān lōñ ñan lōñ, Laḷ = jān lōñ ñan laḷ. Ej kōṃṃan patterns rej tọọr jān chords rej jutak.
marshallese.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Juon filter ej joḷọk frequencies ko ilōñin (lowpass), iumwin (highpass), ak iturin (bandpass) juon cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) ej kaḷapḷọk frequencies epaake cutoff, ej kōṃṃan juon peak.
marshallese.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: oktak in volume iien ñan iien (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: oktak in pitch iien ñan iien (frequency modulation). Erruo rej kōṃṃakūt jān juon LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
marshallese.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Eṃōj lo e ilo 1983. Juon noise burst ej deḷọñ ilo juon delay line ekadu potata ippān feedback. Delay time ej pepe pitch. Juon filter ilo feedback loop ej kōṃṃakūt meram im decay. Ej kajjioñe plucked strings ilo wāween jidik.
marshallese.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer ej juon kein jerbal in composition. Kajjojo step ej jutak kōn juon subdivision in beat. Melody row ej likūt pitched notes, drums rej kobaik rhythm. Musical notation ej kwaḷọk ta eo kwōj kōṃṃane.
marshallese.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Note ko ilo line im space rej jutak kōn pitch. Duration ej walọk jān wāween note: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff ewōr 5 line.
marshallese.try_to_match_this_pattern: Kajjioñ ñan koba ippān pattern in!
marshallese.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: 12 note ilo juon octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier an Bach (1722) ear kareel laḷ in kōn compromise in. Kajjojo note kwōj kōjañe ijin ej pād ioon grid eo.
marshallese.scales_the_major_minor_modal_grammar: Scales — grammar in major + minor + modal
marshallese.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. 7 modes (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) rej itok jān oktak in interval pattern in major scale.
marshallese.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords rej kobaik bar juon third. Music pop = ~6 chords rej bar kōṃṃani; jazz ej kōjerbal extensions im substitutions.
marshallese.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — bed eo iumwin enañin aolep cinematic score. Kajjioñ iv-V-i ilo minor, ak i-VI-VII ñan eñjake in Hans Zimmer. Drones ilo fifths rej rejetak music classical in India im ṃanit ko in bagpipe.
marshallese.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Elōñ music ko rej buñbuñ rej pād ilo 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (eñjake in half-time). Kick ilo 1+3, snare ilo 2+4 = backbeat — foundation in rock + pop.
marshallese.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) ear lo consonance jān integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz ear kaḷapḷọk men in ilo 1862. Ainikien = compression waves; music = patterns jaar errā ñan ba reaiboojoj.
marshallese.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid eobrak, strum plate, im voice presets
marshallese.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Iper e ioon strings ñan strum!
marshallese.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis ej kōjerbal juon oscillator (modulator) ñan ukōt frequency in bar juon (carrier) ṃōkaj. Ratio in modulator:carrier ej pepe harmonic content. Ratios rejjab pen (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) rej kōṃṃan harmonic tones. Ratios rej pen rej kōṃṃan metallic, bell-like, ak inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 ear kōṃṃan bwe FM en buñbuñ ilo 1983.
marshallese.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw ej kobaik elōñ sawtooth oscillators rejjidik detune jān doon. Men in ej kōṃṃan juon ainikien eḷap, depakpak, ej romaak — kōkaḷḷe in EDM, trance, im pop in raan kein. Elōñḷọk voices = mijeljeḷ ak ej kōjerbal elōñḷọk CPU. Detuning ej kōṃṃakūt joñan an voices tutu ettoḷọk ilo tuning — elōñ detune = depakpak/āinwōt chorus, iiet = kilep/lukkuun.
marshallese.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Juon arpeggiator ej kōjañ note ko in chord juon-juon ilo laajrak. "Lōñ" ej etal jān laḷ ñan lōñ, ej kōṃṃan kajoor ej wanlōñ. "Laḷ" ej wanlaḷ ñan eñjake in wōtlọk in dān. Ṃōkaj ej kōṃṃakūt speed (dik = ṃōkaj). Gate ej kōṃṃakūt joñan an kajjojo note jañ (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Kajjioñ ṃōkaj=100ms + 4 octaves + up pattern ñan classic trance arp!
marshallese.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Al, kōnono, ak kōjañ juon instrument — roñjake effects ilo iien eo!
marshallese.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Ewi Wāween Effects Rej Ukōt Sound Waves
marshallese.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Ej joḷọk frequencies ko ilōñin (lowpass) ak iumwin (highpass) juon threshold. Āinwōt kobaik pā ioon lọñiṃ — frequencies ko relōñ rej jako, ainikien ej erom "marok" ḷapḷọk.
marshallese.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Ej kōṃṃan echoes jān copye signal im bar kōjañe ālikin juon iien ekadu. Feedback ej kōṃṃakūt oran echoes rej bar walọk.
marshallese.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Ej kajjioñe acoustics in juon room jān kōṃṃan tọujin echoes redik rej koba ippān doon. Room edik = reverb ekadu, cathedral = reverb aetok.
marshallese.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Ej bukwe peaks in waveform, ukōt sine waves remera ñan wāween repen, ewōr kona. Men in ej kobaik harmonics rekāāl ko rejjab pād ilo ainikien eo ṃokta.
marshallese.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Ej copye signal ippān juon delay edik ej oktak wōt. Men in ej kajjioñe elōñ voices/instruments rej kōjañ ippān doon jab lukkuun jiṃor.
marshallese.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Ej ukōt volume lōñ im laḷ ṃōkaj, ej kōṃṃan juon effect ej iddik. Ekkā ilo surf guitar im music in organ.
marshallese.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Kōjerbal headphones ñe kwōj monitoring ñan bōprae feedback loops! Mic ej etal iloan aolep effects ko ilōñ (filter, delay, reverb, im bar jet) — karōki bwe kwōn roñjake ewi wāween kajjojo ej ukōt ainikieṃ ak instrument eo aṃ.
marshallese.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Kobaik microphone eo aṃ ñan tōl ainikieṃ ak instrument eo aṃ iloan effects chain ilo iien eo.
marshallese.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Lo ainikieṃ āinwōt waveform + frequency spectrum. Roñjake ewi wāween filter, delay, reverb, distortion, im chorus rej ukōt sound waves ilo ānbwin.
marshallese.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Uññūr & iper — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
marshallese.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad ej map jikin addiin peiṃ/mouse ñan musical parameters ilo iien eo. X axis ej kōṃṃakūt pitch (anmiiñ = laḷ, anmooṇ = lōñ). Y axis ej kōṃṃakūt filter cutoff frequency (lōñ = meram, laḷ = marok). Men in ej āinwōt instruments āinwōt Korg Kaoss Pad, eo ear ukōt live electronic music performance jān ukōt 2D gestures ñan ainikien.
marshallese.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Anmiiñ–anmooṇ ej pitch, lōñ–laḷ ej filter brightness. Kōjerbal arrow keys ñan eṃṃakūt im kōjañ juon note; kalikūt Escape ak Space ñan bōjrak.
marshallese.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & bar jet →
marshallese.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Kalikūt cells ñan likūt notes — visual melody editor
marshallese.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions rej kōṃṃan iaḷ ko in eñjake. Chord I (tonic) ej eñjake āinwōt 'ṃweo iṃō.' Chord V (dominant) ej kōṃṃan tension eo ekōṇaan bar rọọl ñan I. Chord vi (relative minor) ej kobaik būroṃōj ak mwilaḷ. Chord IV (subdominant) ej eṃṃakūt ettoḷọk jān ṃweo iṃō ilo jouj. Rej ḷōmṇak bwe progression I-V-vi-IV ej walọk ilo eḷapḷọk jān 70% in al ko in pop kōnke ej kajjidik eñjake kein reṃṃan.
marshallese.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Roman numerals (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) rej jutak kōn degree ko in scale. Leta eḷap = major chord. Leta edik = minor chord.
marshallese.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Kobaik melody notes ilo grid eo ilōñ ↑
marshallese.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Kalikūt melody cells ilo grid eo ilōñ ñan lo notation ijin
marshallese.held_for_a_full_bar: Kar dāpij ñan juon bar eobrak
marshallese.held_for_half_a_bar: Kar dāpij ñan jimattan in juon bar
marshallese.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Kalikūt "Challenge eō!" ñan katak rhythm patterns
marshallese.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Upload WAV/MP3 files ñan custom pads. Samples rej jako ñe kwōj kōkāāl page.
marshallese.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Kobaik patterns ñan juon al eobrak
marshallese.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Kobaik pattern in kiiō āinwōt juon section
marshallese.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Kōṃṃan juon drum pattern ilo grid eo ilōñ, innem kalikūt "+ Kobaik Eo Kiiō āinwōt Section" ñan jino ejaak juon al.
marshallese.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
marshallese.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Ejjañin wōr beats kōjparok. Kōṃṃan juon pattern im kalikūt Kōjparok!
marshallese.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad ej kōṃṃan warm, tones erreo jān koba sine im triangle waves. Kāālōt juon voice, bōk juon chord jān grid eo ilaḷ, innem strum plate!
marshallese.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — uññūr ñan kāālōt, Space ñan strum
marshallese.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — uññūr ak iper ioon
marshallese.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Roñjake, lo waveform, im katak bwebwenato in kajjojo instrument
marshallese.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Eñin wāween instruments reoktak rej bōk ainikien eo aer make! Flute ej harmonic 1 (sine) potata. Clarinet ewōr odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin ewōr aolep. Kalikūt ñan ejaak timbre eo aṃ make!
marshallese.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis ej kōṃṃan ainikien plucked string real jān kōjerbal juon noise burst ekadu eo eṃōj jilkinḷọk ñan juon delay line ippān filtered feedback. Karōk brightness (kōllā in noise eo ṃokta) im damping (aetok in sustain) ñan kōṃṃan mūtōn in string.
marshallese.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: High harmonics rekajoor — ej wie / ej romaak.
marshallese.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental eddo, highs remera. Āinwōt acoustic.
marshallese.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mid eddo im ejjeḷọk fundamental — āinwōt aḷaḷ/cuckoo flute.
marshallese.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Enañin pure fundamental — kilōk / āinwōt sub.
marshallese.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics enañin joñan wōt juon — obrak / timbre in jidik.
marshallese.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Karōk levels in harmonic in fundamental, mid, im high. Widget ej kōjepel ainikien ñan juon iaan 5 timbre reoktak. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk kwaḷọk — sweep im lale wōt.
marshallese.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Hypothesis (jeje anemkwōj): Ta harmonic level ej pepe "meram" im "warm"?
marshallese.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Dāpij ruo sliders pen. Eṃṃakūt juon. Lale.
marshallese.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Pukot ruo settings rej kōṃṃan ejja timbre eo wōt. Ta ratios rej jejaake?
marshallese.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Instruments real ewōr spectra reṃṃan aer. Etale etke flute ej roñ āinjuon jān violin.
marshallese.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ij meḷeḷe — kōmeḷeḷeik ilo naan ko aō
marshallese.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Kōmeḷeḷeik ewi wāween harmonic content ej pepe perception in timbre.
marshallese.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Design note: timbre marker in class 5 reoktak; ejjeḷọk acoustic fidelity score; ejjeḷọk kwaḷọk — kōn ankilaan.
marshallese.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: kōn kōjerbal naan ko repidodo in raan otemjej im sentences rekadu, ejjeḷọk jargon
marshallese.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ñan juon ri-jikuuḷ in grade 5, ekadu im jera
marshallese.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: ñan juon ri-jikuuḷ eo ejeḷā jet music theory
marshallese.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Kalikūt "Kōmeḷeḷeik" ñan AI tutor eo en kwaḷọk ta eo view in ej katakin ilo reading level eo kwaar kāālōt.
marshallese.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Etke instruments rej roñ āinjuon
